phrases.intent_en: Where is Aare river bridge viewpoint
phrases.text_local: Wo ist der Aussichtspunkt für die Aarebrücke?
phrases.cultural_note: Scenic viewpoints are usually marked with dedicated signage.

likely_response.translation_en: At the western end of Höheweg.

responses.english: At the western end of Höheweg.

phrases.intent_en: Where is Platform 1 for trains to Bern
phrases.cultural_note: Platform numbers are typically indicated by large overhead signs and may be referenced in relation to the main entrance.

phrases.intent_en: When does the Spiez train leave tonight
phrases.text_local: Wann fährt heute Abend der Zug nach Spiez?
phrases.cultural_note: Evening schedules may vary; staff at the info desk provide real-time updates.

likely_response.local: Der letzte Zug ist um 22:15 Uhr.
likely_response.translation_en: The last train is at 10:15 PM.

responses.english: The last train is at 10:15 PM.
responses.local: Der letzte Zug ist um 22:15 Uhr.

phrases.intent_en: How do I activate Swiss Travel Pass here
phrases.text_local: Wie aktiviere ich den Swiss Travel Pass?
phrases.cultural_note: Pass activation requires staff assistance; counters are clearly marked.

phrases.intent_en: Is bike rental available at this station
phrases.cultural_note: Bike rental services are often handled at staffed counters or kiosks.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, at the counter next to platform 1.

responses.english: Yes, at the counter next to platform 1.
